name: Accurate Disease Prediction System
description: A machine-learning-based system that classifies 40+ diseases from 132 symptom features, using Decision Tree, Random Forest, Gaussian Naive Bayes, and a Soft Voting Ensemble. Achieved 93.23% accuracy with Random Forest and 93.13% with Gaussian Naive Bayes / Soft Voting Ensemble, evaluated with accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and confusion matrices.
